category_sources: Official GitHub README describes CredStash as a credential management and distribution system using AWS KMS.
source_facts.description says credstash is a utility for managing credentials in the cloud.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the display name CredStash.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site was identified; the official README is the best documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Fugue CredStash GitHub repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official README describes credential management using AWS KMS and DynamoDB.
